title: Registers created by "write_smt2" could be wires by"write_verilog"

features.name: DFF with non-blocking part-select assignment
features.description: Code should include a register with non-blocking assignment to only part of the register array (e.g., s1[0] <= s2) inside a clocked always block
features.snippet:
reg [1:0] s1;
always @(posedge clk) s1[0] <= s2;

features.name: multi-bit register with partial sequential update
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit register where only some bits are assigned in the always block while others remain unchanged
features.snippet:
reg [1:0] s1;
always @(posedge clk) s1[0] <= s2;
